series_metadata.series_description: Formal Affirmative Action Plans for all fiscal years since creation of Ohio EPA. Topics include: Agency Overview, Policy Statements (sexual harassment, major EEO laws and Rules, Discrimination complaint procedure), Recruitment, Selection, Placement, Per

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for 5 years, store at records storage facility for 10 years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
